amendments.reason: Owner expanded hotfix scope to desktop blank-start cache handling, narrow-window toolbar UX, and no-rebuild desktop dev loop.
Add committed full-audit JSON evidence for hotfix exit.
Owner clarified failure occurs on newly opened PTY; preserve real PTY/WebSocket errors in frontend instead of showing reload-only message.
Fix packaged desktop resource layout so backend sources do not occupy Electron resources/app, and harden desktop startup readiness/logging.
Ignore generated staged backend resources after renaming resources/app to resources/backend.
Owner clarified MVP must be self-contained; add portable Python runtime builder and documentation.
Ignore local portable Python download cache used by desktop runtime builder.
Owner reported narrow desktop toolbar overlap between Projects and SciStudio brand.
Owner approved macOS DMG build path with self-contained Python runtime and workflow_dispatch artifact.
Owner approved adding manual macOS DMG GitHub Actions workflow for desktop branch artifacts.
